description: Legal record (#87) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 30r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 1 Kislev 5325 AM (1564 CE). Premarital agreement between the prospective groom Raḍī b. Shemuʾel Berakha and bride Ḥabība bt. Naṣr Ibn al-ʿAṭṭār, who is represented by her maternal aunt Ḥabība bt. Yehuda al-Ḥaqqān before the court session in Bayt Simḥa (Dār Simḥa Synagogue). The prospective bride is predeceased by her father. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
